series_metadata.series_description: Files contain liability waiver, class roster, student evaluation, registration forms, and related information.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Maintain machine readable records on the AS/400 data base permanently ; Microform: Retain diazo copy in operating area for 40 years. Retain master microfilm in off site storage 40 years ; Paper: Retain in operating area 2 years, then microfilm. After microfilm has been checked for quality and completeness, then destroy hard copy, Electronic: Permanent ; Microform: Shred ; Paper: Shred
